name: Uyghur

ancestors.notes: Persian adstrate: lexicon and the Perso-Arabic script.
Arabic adstrate: religious and learned lexicon.

notes: Grapheme inventory NOT YET SPECIFIED (stub). Uyghur is written in the Uyghur Perso-Arabic alphabet (Uyghur Ereb Yéziqi), the official script in Xinjiang. Note that this orthography is unusual among Arabic-script systems in writing ALL vowels with full letters (ا ە ې ى و ۇ ۆ ۈ), so it behaves close to a true alphabet; it is classified here as `abjad` by script family, and a future Tier-A map should treat it as fully vocalised. Latin (Uyghur Latin Yëziqi, ULY) and Cyrillic orthographies are also in use and are not modelled here. No Arabic-letter-to-IPA map is claimed at present.

sources.author: Wikipedia contributors
sources.title: Uyghur alphabets
sources.notes: Letter tables for Uyghur Ereb Yéziqi, ULY and Cyrillic.
